message:
fix: replace syscall.Flock with cross-platform lock.FlockAcquire in orphan.go (gt-o4pw)

Use the existing internal/lock package which has proper build tags
(flock_unix.go / flock_windows.go) instead of raw syscall.Flock calls.
Also fixes a TOCTOU bug where saveSignalState truncated the file via
os.Create before acquiring the lock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
